purpose: Contains and directs gas flow for chemical vapor deposition process, with deposition buildup affecting flow resistance and pressure

inputs.name: tube_name
inputs.description: Alphanumeric identifier for the process tube

outputs.name: process_pressure
outputs.description: Internal pressure of the process tube

states.name: deposition_thickness
states.description: Accumulated deposition buildup on tube walls

states.name: particle_contamination_level
states.description: Level of particle contamination in tube

events.name: excessive_deposition
events.description: Deposition thickness reaches approximately 20 microns requiring tube exchange

events.name: particle_contamination
events.description: Particles exceed specifications requiring tube exchange

parameters.name: deposition_rate
parameters.description: Rate of deposition buildup per unit silane flow

parameters.name: base_pressure
parameters.description: Baseline tube pressure with no flow restriction

parameters.name: pressure_coefficient
parameters.description: Pressure increase per unit flow rate

parameters.name: deposition_pressure_factor
parameters.description: Additional pressure per micron of deposition

state_transition_logic: deposition_thickness increases by deposition_rate * silane_flow_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 25.0]
particle_contamination_level increases by particle_generation_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: process_pressure = base_pressure + pressure_coefficient * nitrogen_flow_rate + deposition_pressure_factor * deposition_thickness
assumptions: Deposition buildup is proportional to silane flow rate and process time
Particle contamination accumulates gradually over time independent of flow rates
Pressure increases linearly with nitrogen flow rate and deposition thickness
Tube exchange resets both deposition thickness and contamination to zero
